ksa_text: Knowledge of AI ethics principles and fairness evaluation methods, including bias detection and measurement techniques, fairness metrics, representativeness assessment, and the relationship between training data characteristics and model equity outcomes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-026 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.3947 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.395, dcwf=0.378, ddat=0.375) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3947 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-026 (composite 0.3947) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3947 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.3947 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3947, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
